resources.string: Swipe through your trip\'s points of interest — photo, info and along-route distance.
The nearest upcoming point of interest ahead on your route.

Trip Companion

Add the "POI Catalog" data field to a full-size ride page, and "Next POI" to your map page.

Everything works offline — 79 POIs and photos are bundled.

Route: Břeclav → Velehrad → Otrokovice.
